title: FAO Survey Protocols for Monitoring Status and Trends of Pollinators
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"d2hlk","text":"The purpose of this document is to present bee monitoring protocols with options for local implementation for groups that are working with the Food and Agriculture Organization of the United Nations (FAO).  Listed below are the parameters that were used in designing the protocols in this document.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
creator: Tonya Lander
